title: Cobblemon Distant Horizons Rivals Modpack
description: The BEST Cobblemon Modpack. Designed for the Cobblemon Rivals Server with Distant Horizons.
body:
Welcome to Cobblemon Rivals!

This Pokémon Minecraft server offers the highest quality and most extensive Cobblemon experience out there! NOW WITH DISTANT HORIZONS!

Join the public server and dive into Minecraft survival with your very own Pokémon! Catch Pokémon, battle gyms, fight bosses, and so much more!
Check out the Discord and IP below!

Server Version: 1.6.1
Minecraft Version: 1.21.1

Server Features:

  • Player and NPC Gyms
  • Mega Evolutions
  • Rideable Pokémon
  • TMs
  • Raid Bosses
  • Legendaries
  • Tournaments
  • Markets
  • Game progress syncs between all realms
  • Dex Ranks and rewards
  • Land Claiming
  • Breeding and Daycare
  • Pokémon Hunts
  • Wild Bosses
  • Active Community and Friendly Playerbase
  • Custom Pokémon Skins
  • GTS/Wondertrade
  • Global Boosters
  • Daily Rewards
  • Custom Spawn Zones
  • Trainer Parks
  • EV Parks
  • Mailbox
  • Warps
  • Move Tutor
  • Lures
  • Custom NPCs
  • Quests
  • Keep Inventory
  • Resource World
  • Cosmetics
  • Player Particles
  • Optional Custom Terrain Generation
  • Server Events
  • Fishing
  • Catch Combos
  • Kits
  • Fossils

Server Links & Info:

Discord: Join Here

Java Server IP: play.cobblemonrivals.com

Cobblemon Rivals is a Cobblemon-themed Minecraft survival server that fosters a welcoming and fun multiplayer experience. Join us for the adventure!
